ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "index_code" TEXT /* Index code of the stock (e.g., SH000001) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the stock */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the stock data was updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "money" REAL /* Money flow of the stock on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in stock price on the given date */,
  "label" REAL /* Label for the data point (e.g., 109.13) */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "pred_change" REAL /* Predicted change in stock price */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock on the given date */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of trading (e.g., active, halted, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the portfolio is public or private */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Current total value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the portfolio stock was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the article is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis score of the article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the prediction is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock on the given date */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used to make the prediction */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the prediction is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock on the given date */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_model_performance" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the performance is for */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model for the given stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the performance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "model_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the performance is for */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in trading volume */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in stock price */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_performance" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the performance is for */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the industry on the given date */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in industry trading volume */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in industry average price */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_performance" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the performance is for */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the sector on the given date */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in sector trading volume */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in sector average price */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_performance" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the performance is for */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the region on the given date */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in region trading volume */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in region average price */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id", "date")
)
